violations.text: (Cheese) was observed held at (61) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
Cheese was observed lacking all information on labels. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Empanadas were observed held at 120-130 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC turned hot holding unit up at the time of inspection. Establishment is not approved to hot-hold. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

Chicken was observed thawing in the stagnant water in the 3-bay sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Chicken was completely submerged under running water at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The cutting boards in the meat cutting area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The produce cooler gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the produce cooler fans have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
